description_long: This is a round, dark wooden table with a polished surface and a rich, deep brown finish. The tabletop is smooth and features subtle wood grain patterns, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The table is supported by a single, sturdy central pedestal that branches out into four curved legs at the base, providing stability and a touch of traditional design. The pedestal and legs are crafted from the same dark wood, seamlessly matching the tabletop. There are no visible drawers, handles, or additional features, emphasizing its simple yet refined construction. The overall design suggests it would be well-suited for use in a dining area, café, or as a decorative piece in a public urban setting.
description: A round, dark wood table with a polished surface and a central pedestal base branching into four curved legs. The design is classic and elegant, with visible wood grain and a rich brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and the central pedestal with four curved legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the wood grain on the tabletop and the symmetry of the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features, showing the smooth tabletop and the sturdy central support.
description_view_3: Rear view with the darkest lighting, emphasizing the rich brown color and the elegant curve of the legs.
attribute_number_of_legs: single central pedestal with four curved feet
